release_notes: TV Mode: short EPG on-channel + full EPG guide from the left menu; RIGHT toggles back to your previous channel. Normal mode: GUI improvements; tapping a show in the EPG shows info + a poster (via TMDB, falls back to VOD search). Dolby 5.1/7.1 toggle in the top menu while playing (only shown when the stream actually supports it). Various memory/stability fixes, and another attempt at the Firestick keyboard issue on the add-server screen.
